title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading, building and running large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate embeddings, pull/list models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat API surface as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs & embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, dark/light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with fluent builder APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and generating with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli (deni5n)
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around Ollama featuring syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Native Zig client for Ollama, useful for low-dependency desktop apps and games.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ supporting chat, generate, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama, enabling reproducible installs on NixOS and macOS.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting and showcasing Ollama projects.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as Generators & Embedders.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that brings local LLM chat to any Discord server via Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers for testing.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that lets users query an Ollama model directly from their knowledge graph.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin for AI-assisted writing using any local Ollama model.
